generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following the strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm convinced we need to prioritize national security over civil liberties in this case. Our allies are already taking similar steps, and we can't afford to be left behind. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
